ddls:
CREATE TABLE "learners" (
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learner */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the learner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the learner */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the learner */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the learner registered in the system */,
  "learning_path_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner's current learning path */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role (e.g., student, educator, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login to the system */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the learner */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the learner */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON column to store learner preferences (e.g., preferred learning style, notification settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("learner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learners_learning_path_id FOREIGN KEY ("learning_path_id") REFERENCES learning_paths ("path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learners_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learning_paths" (
  "path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learning path */,
  "path_name" TEXT /* Name of the learning path */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the learning path */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the learning path was created */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the learning path */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the learning path is active */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration to complete the learning path in hours */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Level of difficulty (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* JSON column to store prerequisites for the learning path */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("path_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learning_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learning site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the learning site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the learning site */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the learning site */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the site belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the site was created */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the site */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the site is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the site was last updated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the site */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_sites_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES learners ("learner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_sites_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES site_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES site_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON column to store role-specific permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learner_site_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner who visited the site */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learning site visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in minutes */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, submit, complete) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Text feedback provided by the learner after the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learner_site_visits_learner_id FOREIGN KEY ("learner_id") REFERENCES learners ("learner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learner_site_visits_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES learning_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learning_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "path_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learning path the step belongs to */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the step */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  "step_order" INTEGER /* Order of the step in the learning path */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the step was created */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the step */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the step is active */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration to complete the step in minutes */,
  "resources_required" TEXT /* JSON column to store required resources for the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_steps_path_id FOREIGN KEY ("path_id") REFERENCES learning_paths ("path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_steps_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES learners ("learner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learner_step_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the step in the learning path */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the step (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the step was completed */,
  "pr_rr" REAL /* Retention rate (PR) for the step */,
  "pr_fr" REAL /* Fluency rate (PR) for the step */,
  "pr_sr" REAL /* Success rate (PR) for the step */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the step was started */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made by the learner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learner_step_progress_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES learning_steps ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learner_step_progress_learner_id FOREIGN KEY ("learner_id") REFERENCES learners ("learner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended node */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was generated */,
  "random_number" REAL /* Random number used to ensure diversity in recommendations */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., based on performance, based on preferences) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_recommendations_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES learning_nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_recommendations_learner_id FOREIGN KEY ("learner_id") REFERENCES learners ("learner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learning_nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learning node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the learning node */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the learning node */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the learning node (e.g., video, quiz, article) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the node was created */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the node */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the node is active */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Level of difficulty (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration to complete the node in minutes */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* JSON column to store prerequisites for the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_nodes_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES learners ("learner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learner_node_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learning node */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, submit, complete) */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in minutes */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained by the learner (if applicable) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Text feedback provided by the learner after the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learner_node_interactions_learner_id FOREIGN KEY ("learner_id") REFERENCES learners ("learner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learner_node_interactions_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES learning_nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES node_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_site_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learning node */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learning site */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the association is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_site_associations_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES learning_nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_site_associations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES learning_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learning_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learning resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the learning resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the learning resource */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the resource */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the resource file in MB */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was created */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the resource */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the resource is active */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Level of difficulty (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration to complete the resource in minutes */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* JSON column to store prerequisites for the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_resources_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES learners ("learner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learner_resource_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learning resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained by the learner (if applicable) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Text feedback provided by the learner after accessing the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learner_resource_access_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES learning_resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learner_resource_access_learner_id FOREIGN KEY ("learner_id") REFERENCES learners ("learner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the user */,
  "educational_background" TEXT /* Educational background of the user */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* JSON column to store privacy settings for the user profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES learners ("learner_id")
)
